character.name: A dormant construct golem standing motionless in an overgrown plaza, its root-stone body overtaken by wild moss and climbing vines, crystal eyes dark and unlit, one massive hand still holding a stone block it never placed, wildflowers growing from cracks in its shoulders, silver-white fog curling around its feet, beautiful and melancholy, a monument to interrupted purpose, not dead but deeply still, expressive face, readable silhouette, gentle stylization, painterly shading, tactile brushwork, hand-painted solarpunk fantasy, storybook warmth, muted dramatic lighting, muted silver and green tones, no neon, no chrome, no cyberpunk
